name: Static Website Hosting Providers
description: Platforms for hosting static websites and JAMstack applications, comparing pricing, performance, features, and developer experience

groups.name: General Information
groups.description: Basic information about the hosting provider

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: Brief description of the platform and primary use case

attributes.name: Website
attributes.description: Official website URL

attributes.name: Parent Company
attributes.description: Company that owns/operates the service

attributes.name: Year Launched
attributes.description: Year the service became publicly available

attributes.name: Open Source
attributes.description: Whether the core platform is open source (not just CLI/SDK)

attributes.name: Primary Focus
attributes.description: What the platform primarily targets

groups.name: Pricing & Limits
groups.description: Free tier availability, pricing, and resource limits

attributes.name: Free Tier
attributes.description: Whether a meaningful free tier exists (not just a trial)

attributes.name: Free Tier Bandwidth
attributes.description: Monthly bandwidth included in free tier

attributes.name: Free Tier Build Minutes
attributes.description: Monthly build minutes included in free tier

attributes.name: Free Tier Sites
attributes.description: Number of sites/projects allowed on the free tier

attributes.name: Paid Plan Starting Price
attributes.description: Lowest paid plan monthly cost

attributes.name: Bandwidth Overage Cost
attributes.description: Cost for exceeding bandwidth limits

attributes.name: Custom / Enterprise Pricing
attributes.description: Whether custom enterprise pricing is available

groups.name: Deployment & Build
groups.description: Build pipeline, deployment options, and workflow features

attributes.name: Git Integration
attributes.description: Supported Git providers for automatic deployments

attributes.name: Auto Deploy on Push
attributes.description: Whether pushes to a connected branch automatically trigger deployments

attributes.name: CLI Deployment
attributes.description: Whether a CLI tool exists for manual/scripted deployments

attributes.name: Build System
attributes.description: Whether the platform has a built-in CI/CD build pipeline

attributes.name: Supported Frameworks
attributes.description: Frameworks with official support or auto-detection

attributes.name: Monorepo Support
attributes.description: Whether the platform can build from a subdirectory of a monorepo

attributes.name: Deploy Previews
attributes.description: Whether preview deployments are created for pull/merge requests

attributes.name: Instant Rollbacks
attributes.description: Whether previous deployments can be promoted without rebuilding

attributes.name: Deploy Notifications
attributes.description: Notification channels for deploy status

groups.name: Performance & Infrastructure
groups.description: CDN, edge network, and performance features

attributes.name: Global CDN
attributes.description: Whether assets are served from a globally distributed CDN

attributes.name: CDN Provider / Network
attributes.description: Underlying CDN or edge network

attributes.name: Edge Locations
attributes.description: Approximate number of edge/PoP locations

attributes.name: HTTP/2 Support
attributes.description: Whether HTTP/2 is supported by default

attributes.name: HTTP/3 Support
attributes.description: Whether HTTP/3 (QUIC) is supported

attributes.name: Response Headers Customization
attributes.description: Whether custom HTTP response headers can be configured

attributes.name: Image Optimization
attributes.description: Whether built-in image optimization/transformation is offered

attributes.name: Asset Compression
attributes.description: Supported automatic compression methods

groups.name: Domains & SSL
groups.description: Custom domain and SSL certificate support

attributes.name: Custom Domains
attributes.description: Whether custom domains can be attached to deployments

attributes.name: Free SSL/TLS
attributes.description: Whether SSL certificates are provisioned automatically at no cost

attributes.name: Wildcard SSL
attributes.description: Whether wildcard SSL certificates are supported

attributes.name: Automatic HTTPS Redirect
attributes.description: Whether HTTP-to-HTTPS redirect is handled automatically

attributes.name: Custom Domain per Preview
attributes.description: Whether preview deployments can have custom domain aliases

groups.name: Serverless & Backend Features
groups.description: Server-side capabilities offered alongside static hosting

attributes.name: Serverless Functions
attributes.description: Whether the platform offers serverless functions as a built-in feature

attributes.name: Functions Runtime
attributes.description: Supported function runtimes

attributes.name: Edge Functions
attributes.description: Whether functions can run at the edge (low-latency, close to users)

attributes.name: Scheduled Functions (Cron)
attributes.description: Whether functions can be triggered on a schedule

attributes.name: Form Handling
attributes.description: Whether built-in form submission handling is available

attributes.name: Authentication
attributes.description: Whether built-in user authentication is provided

attributes.name: Key-Value Storage
attributes.description: Whether a built-in key-value or edge storage solution is available

attributes.name: Database Integration
attributes.description: Whether an integrated database or first-party database addon is offered

groups.name: Routing & Configuration
groups.description: URL routing, redirects, and request handling configuration

attributes.name: Redirects
attributes.description: Whether URL redirects can be configured (301, 302, etc.)

attributes.name: Rewrites / Proxying
attributes.description: Whether URL rewrites or reverse proxying can be configured

attributes.name: Custom 404 Pages
attributes.description: Whether custom not-found pages can be defined

attributes.name: SPA Fallback Routing
attributes.description: Whether single-page application routing is supported

attributes.name: Headers Configuration
attributes.description: Whether custom response headers can be defined per-path or globally

attributes.name: A/B Testing / Split Traffic
attributes.description: Whether traffic can be split between deployments for A/B testing

groups.name: Collaboration & Workflow
groups.description: Team features and development workflow support

attributes.name: Team Members (Free)
attributes.description: Number of team members allowed on the free tier

attributes.name: Role-Based Access Control
attributes.description: Whether different permission levels can be assigned to team members

attributes.name: Audit Logs
attributes.description: Whether an audit trail of actions is available

attributes.name: Environment Variables
attributes.description: Whether environment variables can be configured for builds

attributes.name: Preview Comments
attributes.description: Whether team members can comment on deploy previews

attributes.name: DDoS Protection
attributes.description: Whether DDoS mitigation is included

attributes.name: WAF
attributes.description: Whether a Web Application Firewall is available

attributes.name: SOC 2 Certified
attributes.description: Whether the provider has SOC 2 Type II certification

attributes.name: GDPR Compliant
attributes.description: Whether documented GDPR compliance measures exist

attributes.name: Password Protection
attributes.description: Whether deployed sites can be password-protected

attributes.name: IP Access Control
attributes.description: Whether access can be restricted by IP address

attributes.name: Documentation Quality
attributes.description: Quality of documentation: completeness, clarity, examples, and currency

attributes.name: Plugin / Integration Ecosystem
attributes.description: Major integration categories with official or first-party support

attributes.name: Community Presence
attributes.description: Active community channels

attributes.name: Status Page
attributes.description: Whether a public status/uptime page exists
